seo.title: 3 Day Refresh Yoga Program Overview: Start Your Journey Here
seo.description: Get a fast, clean break with 3 Day Refresh Yoga. See what the program includes, any equipment needed and meet your trainers here.

trainers.bioBodi: Barre Blend™ creator Elise Joan is a former professional dancer and has created programming in all genres of fitness—from barre and yoga to cycling and strength. She is also the creator of Pre-/Postnatal Barre Blend and the “I Am” meditation series on Beachbody On Demand®. Deepen your mind/body connection and build a lean, shredded dancer’s physique with her barre, strength, yoga, and other live classes on BODi™.

A lifelong athlete, Ted approaches yoga with total commitment and focus. He believes in the power of meditation and restorative yoga, which strengthens muscles, builds stamina and prevents injuries. His versatility and knowledge allow him to teach a wide range of students and a variety of styles.

Originally a mathematician, Vytas has been a pioneer in the modern yoga movement for more than 15 years, bringing precision and expert instruction to everything he does. Today, he’s one of the most sought-after instructors in the world—but you can experience his transformative classes live on BODi from the comfort of home.

data.descriptionShort: 3 Yoga workouts designed for each day of your 3-Day Refresh.
data.descriptionLong: These simple and effective yoga routines, led by Elise, Ted and Vytas of the 3 Week Yoga Retreat, help to challenge your body the right amount each day to get the most out of your 3-Day Refresh

modules.title: Nutrition for a Healthier Body and Mind
modules.content: Beachbody’s nutrition programs have made it easier for millions of people to eat healthier and make simple lifestyle changes that are easy to stick with. Created by Autumn Calabrese, Portion Fix shows you how eating the right portions helps you reach your goals—no counting calories or eliminating your favorite foods required. With 2B Mindset, creator Ilana Muhlstein, MS, RDN, helps you lose weight happily by focusing on what you can eat, instead of what you can’t. You’ll never feel hungry or deprived. Need help choosing the right nutrition program for you? To find the right program for your lifestyle, visit FindMyProgramTool.com.

A lifelong athlete, Ted approaches yoga with total commitment and focus. He believes in the power of meditation and restorative yoga, which strengthens muscles, builds stamina and prevents injuries. His versatility and knowledge allow him to teach a wide range of students and a variety of styles.

Originally a mathematician, Vytas has been a pioneer in the modern yoga movement for more than 15 years, bringing precision and expert instruction to everything he does. BoGK5VlBLllbPFYTvOhmSG.title: Day 1: Chill Flow
BoGK5VlBLllbPFYTvOhmSG.descriptionLong: A gentle flow class focused on balance, flexibility, and relaxation, with a short guided meditation on intention.

trainers.bio:
"Super Trainer Elise Joan is the creator of the fitness programs BODi LAVA, Barre Blend, Pre & Post Natal Barre Blend, and co-creator of 3 Week Yoga Retreat and FIRE AND FLOW. She’s a former professional dancer and has created programming in all genres of fitness—from barre and yoga to cycling and strength. In addition to being certified in the Science of Well-Being through Yale University, Elise prioritizes mental health and internal wellness, along with the physical results she’s known for.
"

trainers.bio: He’s one of the most influential yoga teachers in L.A., and one of the most sought-after instructors in the world. He’s been practicing yoga for 15+ years and is a pioneer in the modern yoga movement. A mathematician by training, he mixes precision and exactness in everything he does.
